patterns.headline: Rapid symbol rotation
patterns.message: You opened several symbols in a short behavior window. That can dilute conviction and clarity.

patterns.headline: Repeated focus on USO
patterns.message: You came back to USO more than once. That may indicate stronger natural interest or unresolved uncertainty.

patterns.headline: Mode shifting behavior detected
patterns.message: You changed system mode during this learning window. That can be useful, but it may also reflect searching for clarity.
